result.finding: The application has one external system dependency: MySQL database. The connection is configured via environment variables in application-mysql.properties (MYSQL_HOST, MYSQL_PORT, MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_USERNAME, MYSQL_PASSWORD). Azure Database for MySQL is supported as a managed cloud alternative via the Spring Cloud Azure JDBC MySQL starter. No caching service (Redis), authentication service (LDAP/AD), object storage (S3/Blob), or message broker dependencies exist.
evidence: No LDAP, Redis, S3, Kafka, RabbitMQ, or Elasticsearch configuration found
values: MySQL (relational database, external — default host: localhost:3306)
Azure Database for MySQL (managed cloud alternative)
Purpose: Primary application data store (owners, pets, visits, vets)
